svcextra.config.title: SVC Extra Settings
svcextra.tooltip.noiseCancelMode:
§7WebRTC§r: CPU-based denoising, works on all platforms
§7NVIDIA AI§r: Uses AFX SDK or RTX Voice
svcextra.tooltip.highPassFilter: Filters out low-frequency noise below 80Hz (wind, AC hum, etc.)
svcextra.tooltip.autoGainControl: Automatically adjusts mic volume: amplifies quiet speech, reduces loud sounds
svcextra.tooltip.echoCancel:
Cancels echo from speakers. Enable when using external speakers.
AEC reference is taken from all outgoing audio.
svcextra.tooltip.aecDelayMs:
Echo path delay in milliseconds.
50ms = short-range, 500ms = long-range.
Adjust if echo cancellation isn't working properly.
svcextra.tooltip.rayTraceAudio:
Simulates acoustic reflections using ray tracing.
Requires OpenAL EFX support.
Higher CPU usage.
svcextra.tooltip.rayTraceIntervalMs:
Ray recalculation interval.
5ms = most responsive (high CPU)
3000ms = most efficient (slower response)
svcextra.tooltip.absoluteLoudness:
Simulates louder sound when closer to source.
0% = constant volume
100% = realistic distance-based attenuation
svcextra.tooltip.duckingLevel:
Reduces game volume when someone speaks.
0% = off
100% = completely mute game audio during speech
svcextra.tooltip.frameLengthMs:
Audio frame size. Lower = lower latency but higher bandwidth.
Default: 20ms
svcextra.tooltip.networkTolerance:
Network jitter buffer in milliseconds.
Higher = more stable but more delay.
Default: 200ms
